---
task_id: f7-u2-pass
engineering_decidable_decisions:
  - id: ed-u2-pass
    decision_ref: dec-u2-pass
    touchpoint: U2_db_api_rename
    summary: Rename local Console DB/API field with compatibility shim.
    evidence_list:
      - apps/ccb-console/server/prisma/schema.prisma reviewed
      - apps/ccb-console/server/src/tests/project-routes.spec.ts covers API shape
    reversibility_class: reversible
    rollback_ref: git diff can revert field rename
    scope:
      class: module_local
      paths:
        - apps/ccb-console/server/**
      external_contract_impact: false
    tests_ref:
      - pwsh.exe -NoLogo -Command "pnpm --filter @ccb-console/server test"
    canonical_consistency:
      class: api_compat_preserved
      changes_kernel_semantics: false
      required_decision_refs: []
    decided_by: claude
    created_at: 2026-04-27T00:00:00+08:00
---
